title: Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-RJ45-USBC-5GE USB-C, 5G ethernet adapter
description: The Ubiquiti network adapter enables 5 Gbps connectivity for your computer or laptop. It is equipped with (1) 5 Gbps Ethernet port and a USB-C interface.
